acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md contains a `## 0.12.0 - 2026-07-13` section describing the #23 test-integrity promotion governance feature
package.json and .claude-plugin/plugin.json both declare version 0.12.0 with no other content change
dist/rigor.cjs is byte-identical to a fresh build and to .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs (verified, not rebuilt or committed here)
The recorded required check git diff --check passes; npm run test:all passes on the release branch
The release lands through a protected pull request with rigor and quality checks green; rigor release-check passes on the merged main SHA before tagging v0.12.0
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
